'''Speizoc Arms''' was the producer of several types of military technology, including the [[C-136]] "Grandfather Gun,"<ref name="ISB" /> the [[Speizoc g-2000]],<ref name="CotJ" /> and the [[v-188 Penetrator]].<ref name="ISB" /> [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] possessed several Speizoc anti-vehicle weapons at [[Peregrine's Nest]].<ref name="DFR">''[[Dark Force Rising]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{Mo}}
